Mechanical Engineering Directory

About our faculty and staff

Our nationally recognized faculty, researchers and professional staff are dedicated to excellence in research, education, innovation and service. Learn more about the individuals who make up the Department of Mechanical Engineering by visiting their profiles.

Please reach out directly to the IT helpdesk or facilities team for assistance. 

Mahmoud Abido

  • Instructional Assistant Professor, Mechanical Engineering
  • Assistant Director, Industrial Training and Assessment Center (ITAC)
  • Office: MEOB 213
  • Phone: 979-862-2176
  • Email: m.abido@tamu.edu

Ashutosh Agrawal

  • Professor, Mechanical Engineering and School of Engineering Medicine
  • Email: ashutosh.agrawal@tamu.edu

  • Department Head, Mechanical Engineering
  • Professor, Mechanical Engineering
  • J.M. Forsyth Chair
  • Office: MEOB 102
  • Phone: 979-458-6631
